description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Green wallet that has a zipped opening with an inner zipped pocket Two insert pockets and four card holders on either sides of the inner zipped pocket Stitch detailing and a pleated design all over Buckle design on the front and branding on the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 19 cm x 9 cm
